ops.title: codex quota exhausted until 2026-07-24 — sol lanes reroute
ops.body:
**Fact (2026-07-18):** the codex CLI (gpt-5.6-sol/luna) hit its usage limit — every `codex-ask` fails immediately with "You've hit your usage limit... try again at Jul 24th, 2026 8:28 AM". Purchase credits or wait for reset.

**Routing implications for daemonkit execution until reset:** every Models-table sol lane reroutes per the escalation rule (escalation = judge output, not price): finder/refuter review → opus xhigh (same-tier vs opus work) or fable; security review/audit of P2 trust (fable-implemented) → fable (same-or-higher tier); bounded implementation lanes → opus xhigh. Recon luna lanes → sonnet (the table's own codex-unreachable carve-out).

**Also (independent of quota):** 5-way concurrent codex xhigh fan-outs wedged/OOM'd on this host during P1 (two lanes hung frozen mid-`ccx code read`, two SIGKILLed at exit 137). When codex returns, cap fan-outs at 2 concurrent lanes and instruct codex to use plain `diff`/`cat` instead of ccx tooling for review work.

P1's disposition: opus xhigh finder review substituted for the sol pass (5 packages, 1 low finding — golden fixture discrimination — fixed).
